message:
refactor(SequenceView): remove default height, prefer responsive calculation

Changes height prop default from 300 to undefined:

Before: height = 300 (fixed fallback)
After: height (no default, uses internal responsive logic when undefined)

When height is undefined, SequenceView calculates responsive height
based on device type, orientation, and safe area insets. This change
ensures consistent behavior when parent components (like App.tsx)
pass undefined for mobile devices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
